title: Hilton, Becerra lead in California’s governor primary. See live results here.
description: Latest California governor primary results as Democrats Katie Porter, Tom Steyer and Xavier Becerra and Republicans Chad Bianco, Steve Hilton vie for nominations to replace Gov. Gavin Newsom.

title: Why California is taking so long to count votes in key primary races
description: The state is an outlier in taking days to count most votes, but supporters of the system say it is designed to enfranchise more people while protecting against fraud.

title: Former Biden official Deb Haaland wins New Mexico primary for governor
description: Haaland could make history as the first female Native American governor if she’s elected.

title: The Forest Service says it's closing offices to cut costs. But the math doesn't add up
description: The Forest Service is trying to shut down research hubs because it says it needs to live within its means. But the agency plans to close facilities that cost less than $1 to rent while keeping open one that costs $1 million.

title: Trump acknowledges price pain for farmers as supporters cheer for ending war
description: Besides higher fertilizer and fuel prices, the president also talked at length about D.C.’s fountains and the Reflecting Pool.

title: Graham Platner says his past has been ‘weaponized’ at rally in Maine
description: Supporters brush off negative stories about the Democratic Senate candidate and rebut suggestions that he is the wrong person to take on GOP Sen. Susan Collins.

title: Hegseth takes six of his children to France on official trip
description: The Pentagon says he is covering his family’s travel expenses, but bringing them along could strain his security team during a time of increased threats, officials warned.

title: 5 takeaways from the grueling Senate funding battle that just ended
description: What happened during the 18-hour vote-a-rama on the immigration enforcement package?

title: Democrat Xavier Becerra wins the top spot in November's race for California governor
description: Former Health and Human Services Secretary Xavier Becerra has clinched the top spot on California's ballot for governor. With millions of ballots still to be counted, his November challenger is unknown.

title: After D.C.'s Reflecting Pool gets repainted, visitors ask: What changed?
description: The Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool is refilling after President Trump had it painted "American flag blue." Some visitors say the results of the project — which reportedly cost millions — are subtle.

title: Ex-Border Patrol commander Greg Bovino spoke at an international far-right conference
description: Former Border Patrol commander Greg Bovino recently spoke at an international far-right gathering alongside white supremacists and neo-Nazis.

title: Could Trump become an early lame duck?
description: President Trump needs Congress to help him pass his agenda, but some of his more controversial moves may be getting in the way of his relationship with Republicans on Capitol Hill.

title: Graham Platner isn't going anywhere in Maine Senate race after latest controversy
description: Graham Platner is denying accusations of being physically rough with former girlfriends saying that report in The New York Times and other controversies are a sign his campaign is gaining momentum.

title: As scandals follow Graham Platner, Democrats are losing patience
description: The Maine race is considered crucial to Democrats’ hopes of flipping the Senate, but Platner’s web of controversies is overshadowing other issues.

title: Senate passes immigration bill. And, Jill Biden discusses her husband's 2024 campaign
description: The Senate passed a $70 billion immigration enforcement funding bill after an overnight vote. And, former first lady Jill Biden discusses her husband's 2024 campaign with NPR's Newsmakers.

title: Senate passes $70B immigration enforcement bill
description: The Senate passed legislation early Friday morning to fund President Trump's immigration enforcement agencies through the end of his term.

title: How Senate Republicans in their final months in office could affect Trump's agenda?
description: NPR's Michel Martin asks former Republican National Committee communications director Doug Heye how votes by outgoing Senate Republicans are likely to affect President Trump's agenda.

title: Senate Republicans pass immigration funding after overnight vote
description: After a marathon 18-hour vote, the Senate has funded immigration enforcement. The GOP bill funds ICE and the Border Patrol for three years.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: The four Republicans who broke with Trump on Iran and now face his wrath
description: There are still hurdles before Congress could force the president to end hostilities, but the House resolution reflects lawmakers' growing impatience, including within Trump's own party.

title: California Democrats play it safe with Becerra, defying national trends
description: In the complicated governor’s race, voters embraced the former health secretary’s centrist stance over the passionate promises of insurgent candidates.
